name: @sonofg0tham/quell-claude
description: Claude Code plugin: blocks user prompts that contain API keys, passwords, or other secrets via the UserPromptSubmit hook.

scripts.bundle-scanner: cd ../scanner && npm run build && cd ../claude-plugin && node -e "['SecretScanner.js','SecretScanner.d.ts','index.js','index.d.ts'].forEach(f => require('fs').copyFileSync('../scanner/dist/'+f, 'scanner/'+f))"

author: Craig McCart
